description: As part of the month-end close, an accountant needs to amortize the company's prepaid insurance policy.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the prepaid expenses sub-ledger, specifically for the annual insurance policy.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the policy with a starting balance of $12,000 and a 12-month term.
Agent correctly calculates the monthly expense of $1,000.

nodes.task_description: Create and post the recurring journal entry to debit Insurance Expense and credit Prepaid Insurance.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates and posts the correct journal entry.
